title: Duplicate emails from automation
excerpt: I have several automations that when a Status changes, it emails the board subscribers or a Team.  However, when the Status is changed, everyone gets 5 emails (size of team) - a duplicate email with the email address of …

posts.author: pstrengCG (Paul)
posts.cookedHtml: I have several automations that when a Status changes, it emails the board subscribers or a Team. However, when the Status is changed, everyone gets 5 emails (size of team) - a duplicate email with the email address of each team member. How do we change that - it is very annoying to have to delete all the redundancy.
